inputs.titre: Achèvement de la construction du Taj Mahal à Agra

reason: The image shows the Taj Mahal and figures who could be workers or supervisors. However, there is a modern vehicle visible in the background. The clothing is questionable, and lace collars are not the usual garb for labourers. There are too many anachronisms. The image also appears to be generated by AI, and fails on several accuracy fronts.
